macro.title: Ferrari tops Wall Street's first-quarter expectations ahead of EV debut - CNBC
macro.summary: Ferrari NV on Tuesday beat Wall Street's first quarter earnings expectations and reconfirmed its guidance for the year.

macro.title: Coinbase cuts headcount by 14% citing AI acceleration. The shares are gaining - CNBC
macro.summary: Coinbase will cut roughly 14% of its workforce, citing a combination of market volatility and the how AI is quickly changing how the company operates.

macro.title: Wealthy families regret rushing to give gifts after tax law changed - USA Today
macro.summary: Wealthy families rushed to give away assets to save on taxes, but a new law made exemptions permanent, causing some 'buyer's remorse'.
